files.source_name: ENTSO-E Transparency Platform - Day-ahead hourly prices
files.transformation_note: Compressed into monthly average wholesale price samples for 2024-01 to 2025-12 so the MVP remains deterministic and does not require an API key.
files.intended_use: Benchmark the wholesale energy component during invoice validation.

files.transformation_note: Reduced to monthly seasonal load indices that approximate manufacturing electricity seasonality in the West Midlands.
files.intended_use: Shape synthetic monthly kWh volumes for the Birmingham SME scenario.

files.transformation_note: Extracted to a one-row CSV containing the location-based electricity factor used by the MVP.
files.intended_use: Calculate SECR-ready Scope 2 emissions from electricity consumption.

files.transformation_note: Internal planning assumptions layered on top of official UK market samples to create a deterministic 12-month budget forecast for the demo.
files.intended_use: Drive budget and forecasting outputs for the UK SME scenario.
